{{Infobox character
| name = Oracle Sage
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Sage of a Thousand Eyes
| affiliations = House Arelius
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Oracle]] [[Sage]], also known as the [[Sage of a Thousand Eyes]], is a battle-hardened combatant characterized by numerous eyes that glow with the intensity of a sunrise. In conflict, she provides strategic guidance to [[House Shen]] forces, though she is considered an irritating adversary who struggles in direct, uncomplicated fights; many standard Archlords are capable of fighting her on equal terms. Physically, she is described as a weathered individual who wields a large two-handed [[sword]] and has the ability to manipulate light. Beyond her martial prowess, she possesses prophetic abilities, allowing her to view potential futures and offer blessings or warnings to others. She maintains a commanding presence, directing the actions of those around her and offering advice on survival during critical moments.}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Known as the [[Sage of a Thousand Eyes]], the Oracle [[Sage]] is one of the individuals present during these events. Rather than engaging directly in combat, the entity focuses on directing forces for [[House Arelius]]. During the conflict, the Oracle [[Sage]] provides specialized sight that enables [[Mercy]] to identify a target highlighted in purple light.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Oracle Sage]] does not engage directly in battle.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Oracle Sage]] directs forces for [[House Arelius]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Oracle Sage]] is also known as the [[Sage of a Thousand Eyes]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c16">''Waybound'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Oracle Sage]] is one of the characters present.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Oracle Sage]] provides sight that allows [[Mercy]] to see a target highlighted in purple light.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20">''Waybound'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“You can send us back home!” Mercy said encouragingly to the Oracle Sage.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
